title: equisetum × haukeanum
intro: Equisetum × haukeanum, a hybrid plant of the genus Equisetum, is a type of horsetail that is often used in herbal medicine due to its unique properties. This plant is rich in silica, which gives it medicinal properties that can aid in detoxification and anti-inflammatory processes. The health benefits of Equisetum × haukeanum include treating urinary tract infections, kidney stones, and other kidney-related issues, as well as helping to improve bone health and reduce inflammation. Equisetum × haukeanum can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
